match.userMessage:
Steady handheld close-up slowly drifts forward on Scarlett leaning into the round vanity mirror. She draws one smooth, deliberate stroke of coral lipstick across her lower lip, then reaches for a tissue and blots once with gentle pressure.
Morning sunlight shifts softly across her hands and the white tabletop during the motion.
Natural micro-movements keep the frame intimate and tactile throughout the six-second ritual.

soft morning room tone with faint birdsong outside window. soft lipstick stroke on lips, gentle tissue blot.

Single continuous shot, no cuts. Avoid jitter and bent limbs.
